title: Chalkola 10 Liquid Chalk Pens for Blackboard - (10 pack, 6mm Reversible Tip) | Chalkboard Markers Erasable for Window, Glass, Car, Mirror, Wall Calendar - Non Toxic, Washable, Wet Erase Chalk Pens
features: Come off Easy - The chalkboard pen will work on almost any surface! These chalk board markers are washable & will erase off on non-porous surfaces such as glass & mirrors (dry & wet erase) & permanent on porous surfaces (like wood)

Can Be Used On Many Surfaces - Use these erasable chalk paint markers to write on calendars, wedding signs, shop storefronts, milestone boards, blackboard displays, LED boards, vinyl surfaces. Use as car window markers, bistro chalk markers.

Perfect For Every Creator - Whether you're a teacher, artist, restaurant owner or parent, these dry erase chalk markers for blackboard create beautiful displays effortlessly in, menus, signs and home activities

Mess-Free Performance - Unlike regular chalk that creates dust and stains, these non-toxic dry erase markers are washable, dustless and completely safe. No more dirty hands or chalk residue - simply wipe clean with a damp cloth

Long-Lasting Performance - While other markers crack and lose color under heavy use, our richly pigmented liquid chalk markers deliver smooth, consistent ink flow without skipping or fading. Tips resist fraying with continued use
Versatile Tip Design - Featuring reversible 6mm bullet & chisel tips for versatile writing styles. Tips stay flexible with smooth ink flow, while tight-fitting caps prevent drying when stored
Vibrant Color Selection - Set includes highly opaque, bold colors that show up bright and clear on dark surfaces. Quick-drying, smudge-resistant formula provides consistent coverage
description: Chalkola Chalk Markers - Transform any surface into a vibrant canvas of creativity! These premium markers have become the most trusted choice for artists, teachers, event planners, business owners, crafters, and families. Whether you're designing stunning window displays, creating engaging school materials, organizing home calendars, or crafting beautiful wedding signs, our markers deliver professional-quality results every time. These versatile markers work exceptionally well on non-porous surfaces including glass boards, windows, whiteboards, LED writing boards, wall calendars, acrylic displays, and vinyl surfaces. Our water-based, dustless formula creates bold, opaque colors that show up brilliantly on dark surfaces while being completely non-toxic and safe for all. What Makes Chalkola Different? Our markers deliver smooth ink flow and consistent coverage while allowing easy cleanup with a damp cloth, leaving no ghosting or residue behind. Perfect for both everyday use and special occasions. From teachers making blackboard displays to parents working on activities, office professionals creating presentations, or retail stores designing storefront displays - these markers bring creativity to life in every project. Create professional-looking calendars, menus, signs, and displays that capture attention and communicate clearly. Experience the perfect blend of quality, versatility, and vibrant expression with Chalkola - where creativity meets professional results in every marker.
